_description: PIVOT_1 — half-window BTC autocorrelation. Non-oracle. Fires when T 60-180s AND |delta_bps| >= 5 AND entry <= 0.75. Validated on 69d klines: 78.5% WR, ~241 fires/day raw, ~$30/trade EV at 67c entry. Halt scales with base size: PIV_HALT_MULT_OF_BASE × PIV_BASE_DOLLARS = halt threshold (negative). At $200 base, halt = -$500 over 16 trades, 60min cooldown. If you change BASE_DOLLARS, halt auto-scales.
